content.text: How can I programmatically configure the appearance and behavior of an X-axis in my visualization?
If I initialize this with `name='myCustomAxis'`, does it still create an 'x2Axis' even if `self.focus_enable` is true?
No, the code specifically checks if the function receives a name equal to "xAxis" (`if name == "xAxis"`), so custom axis names will never trigger the creation of a secondary axis.
That makes sense; I appreciate the clarification!
